Case studies
Travel · CRM · Automation · RPA

Cocktail Holidays

Full digital transformation of a UK-based travel operator — booking system, supplier integrations, CRM, marketing automation, RPA, and website. Managed from 0 to exit.

$7Mpeak revenue before exit
3×bookings handled with same team
60%reduction in manual admin
Product ManagementCRMAutomationRPAWeb Design
Agriculture · CRM · Portal · UK & South Africa

Agri Novatex
